name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve ZotExtract
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Right-click '...'
3. Select '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste the Zotero error log (**Help → Debug Output Logging**).

## Environment

- **Zotero version:** (e.g. 7.0.x)
- **ZotExtract version:** (e.g. 1.0.0)
- **Operating system:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **LLM provider:** (e.g. OpenAI, Ollama, local)

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
